Off Calendar Jul-13-2005 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES: APPEARANCES:

Bijan Khaleghi in pro per, Plaintiff/Respondent
No appearance of Defendant/Appellant.

This matter came on regularly for a small claims appeal. Stipulation to pro tem judge signed. The paries were sworn and testified.

After presented oral and documentary evidence to the court.

At the conclusion of the hearing, the matter was taken under submission.
